description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester, has a mesh like fabric, an elasticated waist with a drawstring on the outside, zippered pocket at the back, embroidered puma Leaping cat on the right thigh, print on the left thigh and a contrast piping on the left sideFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironDesigned for the sporty soul, this pair of shorts from puma is crafted from soft and absorbent polyester fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. Slip into these shorts when blazing the trail on a healthy run, or on casual day at home, and revel in heavenly comfort.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
